title: 目標達成の後に・あの回のように

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer recognizes my effort and gives me the OK
to enter the Japanese Oaks! I'm doing the Tiara
tour for real!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm late to the press conference and get
scolded for not giving serious responses. Oh...
This is such a disaster...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to mentally mature and learn to properly
respond to my fans' expectations! I'll stake
everything on this Princess☆Right Hook!
